title: Hand-Stitched Leather Tool Rolls & Aprons • Asheville, NC
announcement: Thanks for stopping by Old North Leather Co. Everything is cut and stitched by hand in my shop in Asheville, NC using full-grain veg-tan leather. Tool rolls, aprons, and small forged tools for woodworkers and makers. Made-to-order pieces take 1-2 weeks. Want a custom slot layout for your chisels? Just message me.
sale_message: Order's in, thank you. I hand-cut and stitch each piece so give me a few business days to get started. Leather is a natural material so grain and tone vary a little piece to piece. Reach out any time with questions.
policy_welcome: Welcome to Old North Leather Co.
policy_payment: Payment through Etsy secure checkout: credit and debit cards, Etsy gift cards, and PayPal. Custom orders over $150 need a 50% deposit up front.
policy_shipping: Ships USPS from Asheville, NC. Ready-to-ship items go out in 3-5 business days. Made-to-order tool rolls and aprons ship in 10-14 business days. Larger orders ship insured.
policy_refunds: Want you to be happy with it. If it shows up damaged, message me within 3 days with photos and I'll fix it. Custom pieces cut to your spec are not returnable, but reach out and we'll figure it out.
